query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS critical_events (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  newsId INT NOT NULL,
  eventType ENUM(
    'COMPLIANCE_DEADLINE',
    'REGULATORY_AMENDMENT',
    'CONSULTATION_PERIOD',
    'NEW_REGULATION',
    'GS1_STANDARD_UPDATE',
    'ENFORCEMENT_ACTION',
    'TECHNICAL_GUIDANCE',
    'SECTOR_MANDATE'
  ) NOT NULL,
  severity ENUM('CRITICAL', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW') NOT NULL,
  eventDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  daysUntilEvent INT NULL,
  detectionConfidence DECIMAL(3, 2) NULL,
  affectedRegulations JSON NULL,
  affectedStandards JSON NULL,
  affectedSectors JSON NULL,
  actionRequired TEXT NULL,
  alertSent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  alertSentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  viewCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  acknowledgeCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  reviewed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  reviewNotes TEXT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX newsId_idx (newsId),
  INDEX eventType_idx (eventType),
  INDEX severity_idx (severity),
  INDEX eventDate_idx (eventDate),
  INDEX alertSent_idx (alertSent)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS critical_events (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

  eventType ENUM(
    'COMPLIANCE_DEADLINE',
    'REGULATORY_AMENDMENT',
    'CONSULTATION_PERIOD',
    'NEW_REGULATION',
    'GS1_STANDARD_UPDATE',
    'ENFORCEMENT_ACTION',
    'TECHNICAL_GUIDANCE',
    'SECTOR_MANDATE'
  ) NOT NULL,
  severity ENUM('CRITICAL', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW') NOT NULL,
  eventDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  daysUntilEvent INT NULL,
  detectionConfidence DECIMAL(3, 2) NULL,
  affectedRegulations JSON NULL,
  affectedStandards JSON NULL,
  affectedSectors JSON NULL,
  actionRequired TEXT NULL,
  alertSent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  alertSentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  viewCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  acknowledgeCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  reviewed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  reviewNotes TEXT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX newsId_idx (newsId),
  INDEX eventType_idx (eventType),
  INDEX severity_idx (severity),
  INDEX eventDate_idx (eventDate),
  INDEX alertSent_idx (alertSent)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
